description: Completely redesign the landing page (app/page.tsx) to be visually dynamic with AI images, CSS animations, floating elements, and a modern SaaS look (Linear/Vercel/Raycast style). Replace the current text-heavy generic design with a visual-first, animated, dark-themed page.
steps: Add new keyframe animations to app/globals.css for the landing page: float (gentle up-down), orbit (circular rotation), gradient-shift (background color animation), slide-in-left, slide-in-right, fade-in-up with stagger delays, typing cursor blink, pulse-ring, and particle-float. These should be added in a clearly-marked landing page section.

Completely rewrite app/page.tsx with a modern dynamic design. The page must include: (1) HERO section - dark gradient background (slate-950 to violet-950), animated gradient text heading that's short and punchy (not walls of text), a single line of subtext, CTA buttons, floating geometric shapes (circles/squares with blur and animation), and a typing animation effect on the headline. (2) SOCIAL PROOF bar - 'Trusted by 500+ teams' with animated logo/company placeholders sliding in. (3) FEATURES section - 3-4 key features max as glass-morphism cards with icons, hover scale animations, and background glow effects. Much less text than current version. (4) AI-POWERED section - highlight AI capabilities with a gradient card, floating sparkle elements, and an Unsplash image (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535378917042-10a22c95931a?w=800&h=600&fit=crop). (5) VISUAL SHOWCASE - use Unsplash images (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&h=600&fit=crop for dashboard, https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551434678-e076c223a692?w=800&h=600&fit=crop for team). (6) PLUGIN/INTEGRATION section - show connectivity with animated dots/connection lines and floating tech icons. (7) PRICING teaser - 3 clean tier cards (Free/Pro/Enterprise) with glassmorphism and hover effects. (8) CTA FOOTER - gradient background with a strong call-to-action. Keep the existing nav structure but make it glass-morphism style.

Ensure all animations use CSS only (no framer-motion or external libraries). Use Intersection Observer via the existing AnimatedCounter pattern for scroll-triggered animations. Add floating background shapes throughout with CSS keyframe animations (float, orbit). Use the existing Tailwind animate classes where possible and extend in globals.css for new ones.

Ensure the page is mobile responsive, uses dark-first design (dark mode as default visual), uses the violet/indigo accent colors, has glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur with semi-transparent backgrounds), and includes all Unsplash placeholder images: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551434678-e076c223a692?w=800&h=600&fit=crop (team), https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=800&h=600&fit=crop (dashboard), https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1553877522-43269d4ea984?w=800&h=600&fit=crop (tech), https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?w=800&h=600&fit=crop (team working), https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535378917042-10a22c95931a?w=800&h=600&fit=crop (AI abstract)

The page must pass npx tsc --noEmit. Keep 'use client' directive. Import from lucide-react for icons and next/link for navigation. Reduce text content significantly compared to current page - focus on visuals and whitespace.
acceptance_criteria: app/page.tsx is completely rewritten with a visual-first dynamic design
Page has animated gradient background with floating geometric shapes
Page includes at least 3 Unsplash placeholder images
Page has CSS-only animations (float, fade-in, gradient-shift, hover effects)
Page has glass-morphism cards (backdrop-blur + semi-transparent bg)
Page has significantly less text than before - short punchy headings only
Page has hero, social proof, features (3-4 max), AI section, integrations, pricing (3 tiers), and CTA footer
Page passes npx tsc --noEmit without errors
Page is mobile responsive using Tailwind responsive classes
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit in the project root to verify TypeScript compilation passes
findings: Completely rewrote landing page with dark-first design (bg-slate-950), animated gradient text headline, floating shapes with CSS animations, 3 Unsplash images via next/image (added images.unsplash.com to remotePatterns in next.config.mjs), 4 glass-morphism feature cards, AI section with floating sparkles, integrations grid with pulse-ring animation, 3-tier pricing with Popular badge, and gradient CTA footer. Added 8 keyframe animations to globals.css. TypeScript compiles clean.
